steps.title: Distribute each term
steps.content:
Multiply each term in the first factor by each term in the second factor, making sure every product is included:
$$(2x^3)(x^3)+(2x^3)(-2x)+(3x)(x^3)+(3x)(-2x)$$

steps.title: Write the equivalent expression
steps.content:
After combining like terms, the simplified expression is
$$2x^6-x^4-6x^2$$
This is equivalent to the original product. The answer is C.
